sqlMap.select:
SELECT pt.*, pt.home_police_station_id AS homePoliceStationId, pt.house_province AS houseProvince, pt.house_city AS houseCity, pt.house_county AS houseCounty, pt.house_town AS houseTown, pt.home_province AS homeProvince, pt.home_city AS homeCity, pt.home_county AS homeCounty, pt.home_town AS homeTown, pt.handle_unit AS handleUnit, pt.handle_unit_code AS handleUnitCode, pt.has_shedu_record AS hasSheduRecord, pt.has_shechang_record AS hasSechangRecord, pt.is_minor AS isMinor, d1.departname AS jurisdictunit,d2.departname AS policephone, u1.staffName as jurisdictpolice,u2.staffName as incontrolleve,rt.telnumber FROM p_personnel_t pt
LEFT JOIN sys_department_t d1 on pt.jdunit1=d1.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t d2 on pt.jdunit2=d2.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t u1 on pt.jdpolice1=u1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t u2 on pt.jdpolice2=u2.id LEFT JOIN p_relation_t rt on rt.personnelid=pt.id and rt.validflag>0 WHERE pt.validflag > 0 AND pt.id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_personnel_t (cardnumber,personname,personlabel,sexes,persontype,attributelabels,jdunit1,jdpolice1,pphone1,zslabel1,lslabel1, jdunit2,jdpolice2,pphone2,validflag,addoperator,addoperatorid,addtime,memo,houseplace,homeplace,checkmethod, records,nation,marrystatus,education,workplace) VALUES ('$cardnumber$','$personname$','$personlabel$','$sexes$','$persontype$','$attributelabels$','$jdunit1$','$jdpolice1$', '$pphone1$','$zslabel1$','$lslabel1$','$jdunit2$','$jdpolice2$','$pphone2$',$validflag$,'$addoperator$',$addoperatorid$, '$addtime$','$memo$','$houseplace$','$homeplace$','$checkmethod$','$records$','$nation$','$marrystatus$','$education$','$workplace$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_personnel_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$

UPDATE p_personnel_t SET usedname='$usedname$',nickname='$nickname$',nation='$nation$',marrystatus='$marrystatus$', personheight='$personheight$',netskillhabit='$netskillhabit$', education='$education$',persontype='$persontype$',soldierstatus='$soldierstatus$', heathstatus='$heathstatus$',politicalposition='$politicalposition$',faith='$faith$', houseplace='$houseplace$',housepolice='$housepolice$', homeplace='$homeplace$',homepolice='$homepolice$',homewifi='$homewifi$',homewide='$homewide$', workplace='$workplace$',workpolice='$workpolice$',workwifi='$workwifi$',workwide='$workwide$', housex='$housex$',housey='$housey$', homex='$homex$',homey='$homey$', workx='$workx$',worky='$worky$', feature='$feature$',speciality='$speciality$',records='$records$',checkmethod='$checkmethod$', personlabel='$personlabel$',attributelabels='$attributelabels$', maintainrate1=$maintainrate1$,maintainrate1=$maintainrate2$, maintainrate1=$maintainrate3$,maintainrate1=$maintainrate4$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$',memo='$memo$', jdunit1='$jdunit1$',jdpolice1='$jdpolice1$',pphone1='$pphone1$',zslabel1='$zslabel1$', jdunit2='$jdunit2$',jdpolice2='$jdpolice2$',pphone2='$pphone2$' WHERE id = $id$

UPDATE p_personnel_t SET personname='$personname$',usedname='$usedname$',nickname='$nickname$',nation='$nation$',marrystatus='$marrystatus$', personheight='$personheight$',netskillhabit='$netskillhabit$', education='$education$',persontype='$persontype$',soldierstatus='$soldierstatus$', heathstatus='$heathstatus$',politicalposition='$politicalposition$',faith='$faith$', houseplace='$houseplace$',housepolice='$housepolice$', homeplace='$homeplace$',homepolice='$homepolice$',homewifi='$homewifi$',homewide='$homewide$', workplace='$workplace$',workpolice='$workpolice$',workwifi='$workwifi$',workwide='$workwide$', housex='$housex$',housey='$housey$', homex='$homex$',homey='$homey$', workx='$workx$',worky='$worky$', feature='$feature$',speciality='$speciality$',records='$records$',checkmethod='$checkmethod$', personlabel='$personlabel$',attributelabels='$attributelabels$', maintainrate1=$maintainrate1$,maintainrate1=$maintainrate2$, maintainrate1=$maintainrate3$,maintainrate1=$maintainrate4$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$',memo='$memo$', jdunit1='$jdunit1$',jdpolice1='$jdpolice1$',pphone1='$pphone1$',zslabel1='$zslabel1$', jdunit2='$jdunit2$',jdpolice2='$jdpolice2$',pphone2='$pphone2$', house_province='$houseProvince$',house_city='$houseCity$',house_county='$houseCounty$',house_town='$houseTown$', home_province='$homeProvince$',home_city='$homeCity$',home_county='$homeCounty$',home_town='$homeTown$', handle_unit='$handleUnit$',handle_unit_code='$handleUnitCode$', home_police_station_id=#homePoliceStationId#, house_police_station_id=#housePoliceStationId# has_shedu_record=$hasSheduRecord$ has_shechang_record=$hasSechangRecord$ is_minor=$isMinor$ WHERE id = $id$

UPDATE p_personnel_t SET personname='$personname$',sexes='$sexes$',usedname='$usedname$',nickname='$nickname$',nation='$nation$',marrystatus='$marrystatus$', personheight='$personheight$',netskillhabit='$netskillhabit$', education='$education$',persontype='$persontype$',soldierstatus='$soldierstatus$', heathstatus='$heathstatus$',politicalposition='$politicalposition$',faith='$faith$', houseplace='$houseplace$',housepolice='$housepolice$', homeplace='$homeplace$',homepolice='$homepolice$',homewifi='$homewifi$',homewide='$homewide$', workplace='$workplace$',workpolice='$workpolice$',workwifi='$workwifi$',workwide='$workwide$', housex='$housex$',housey='$housey$', homex='$homex$',homey='$homey$', workx='$workx$',worky='$worky$', feature='$feature$',speciality='$speciality$',records='$records$',checkmethod='$checkmethod$', personlabel='$personlabel$',attributelabels='$attributelabels$', maintainrate1=$maintainrate1$,maintainrate1=$maintainrate2$, maintainrate1=$maintainrate3$,maintainrate1=$maintainrate4$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$',memo='$memo$', jdunit1='$jdunit1$',jdpolice1='$jdpolice1$',pphone1='$pphone1$',zslabel1='$zslabel1$', jdunit2='$jdunit2$',jdpolice2='$jdpolice2$',pphone2='$pphone2$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM p_personnel_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND cardnumber = '$cardnumber$' and isrisk = 1 ORDER BY id desc LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(pt.id) FROM p_personnel_t pt
WHERE pt.validflag>0 and pt.isrisk = 1
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
FIND_IN_SET(pt.marrystatus,'$marrystatus$')
FIND_IN_SET(pt.education,'$education$')
FIND_IN_SET(pt.persontype,'$persontype$')
pt.nation='$nation$'
pt.soldierstatus='$soldierstatus$'
pt.heathstatus='$heathstatus$'
pt.politicalposition='$politicalposition$'
pt.faith='$faith$'
($sqlall$)

SELECT A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(ppt.personlabel ORDER BY ppt.id SEPARATOR ',') AS attributelabelname FROM (SELECT pt.*,GROUP_CONCAT(P.personlabel ORDER BY P.id SEPARATOR ',') AS personlabelname FROM p_personnel_t pt
LEFT JOIN (select 1 id,'涉稳人员' personlabel from DUAL UNION select 2 id,'涉恐人员' personlabel from DUAL UNION select 3 id,'涉黑人员' personlabel from DUAL UNION select 4 id,'涉毒人员' personlabel from DUAL) P ON FIND_IN_SET(P.id,pt.personlabel) WHERE pt.validflag>0 and pt.isrisk = 1
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
FIND_IN_SET(pt.marrystatus,'$marrystatus$')
FIND_IN_SET(pt.education,'$education$')
FIND_IN_SET(pt.persontype,'$persontype$')
pt.nation='$nation$'
pt.soldierstatus='$soldierstatus$'
pt.heathstatus='$heathstatus$'
pt.politicalposition='$politicalposition$'
pt.faith='$faith$'
($sqlall$)
GROUP BY pt.id) A LEFT JOIN p_attributelabel_t pat ON (FIND_IN_SET(pat.id,A.attributelabels)>0 AND pat.validflag>0) LEFT JOIN p_personlabel_t ppt ON (FIND_IN_SET(pat.id,ppt.attributelabels)>0 AND ppt.validflag>0) GROUP BY A.id ORDER BY if(isnull(A.zslabel1),1,0),if(length(A.zslabel1),0,1),if(FIND_IN_SET(1,A.zslabel1),0,1),A.updatetime desc

SELECT COUNT(pt.id) FROM p_personnel_t pt LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut1 ON pt.jdpolice1=ut1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut2 ON pt.jdpolice2=ut2.id WHERE pt.validflag>0 and pt.isrisk = 1 and ((pt.zslabel1=3 and (select count(1) from p_hei_editor_t where validflag=1 and ( FIND_IN_SET($addoperatorid$,editableid) OR addoperatorid = $addoperatorid$ ) )>0 ) or pt.zslabel1!=3 ) and ((pt.zslabel1=9 and (pt.jdpolice1=$addoperatorid$ or pt.jdpolice2=$addoperatorid$)) or pt.zslabel1!=9 )
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
IFNULL((SELECT count(id) FROM p_relation_telnumber_t WHERE personnelid=pt.id AND validflag>0 AND telnumber like '%$telnumber$%'),0)>0
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
(FIND_IN_SET(pt.jdunit1,'$jdunit1$') OR FIND_IN_SET(pt.jdunit2,'$jdunit1$'))
(ut1.staffName like '%$jdpolice1$%' OR ut2.staffName like '%$jdpolice1$%')
pt.persontype = '$persontype$'
(pt.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or pt.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(pt.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or pt.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
($sqlall$)

SELECT pt.*,IFNULL(dt.departname,'') AS jurisdictunit,IFNULL(ut1.staffName,'') AS jurisdictpolice FROM p_personnel_t pt LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut1 ON pt.jdpolice1=ut1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut2 ON pt.jdpolice2=ut2.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt ON pt.jdunit1=dt.id WHERE pt.validflag>0 and pt.isrisk = 1 and ((pt.zslabel1=3 and (select count(1) from p_hei_editor_t where validflag=1 and ( FIND_IN_SET($addoperatorid$,editableid) OR addoperatorid = $addoperatorid$ ) )>0 ) or pt.zslabel1!=3 ) and ((pt.zslabel1=9 and (pt.jdpolice1=$addoperatorid$ or pt.jdpolice2=$addoperatorid$)) or pt.zslabel1!=9 )
pt.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
pt.personname like '%$personname$%'
IFNULL((SELECT count(id) FROM p_relation_telnumber_t WHERE personnelid=pt.id AND validflag>0 AND telnumber like '%$telnumber$%'),0)>0
pt.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
(FIND_IN_SET(pt.jdunit1,'$jdunit1$') OR FIND_IN_SET(pt.jdunit2,'$jdunit1$'))
(ut1.staffName like '%$jdpolice1$%' OR ut2.staffName like '%$jdpolice1$%')
pt.persontype = '$persontype$'
(pt.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or pt.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(pt.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or pt.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
($sqlall$)
order by if(isnull(pt.zslabel1),1,0),if(length(pt.zslabel1),0,1),if(FIND_IN_SET(1,pt.zslabel1),0,1),pt.updatetime desc

select p.* ,sf.fileallName from e_keypersonnel_t kp LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on kp.personnelid = p.id and p.isrisk = 1 LEFT JOIN p_personnel_photo_t ph on ph.personnelid = p.id and ph.validflag>0 and defaultflag=1 LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf on sf.id = ph.fileid and sf.validflag>0 where kp.validflag>0 and kp.cdtid=#cdtid# and p.validflag>0
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_attributelabel_t (attributelabel,parentid,examineflag,departmentid,validflag,adddepartmentid,addoperatorid,addoperator,addtime,examineman,examinetime,memo) VALUES ('$attributelabel$',$parentid$,$examineflag$,'$departmentid$',$validflag$,$adddepartmentid$,$addoperatorid$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$examineman$','$examinetime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_attributelabel_t SET attributelabel = '$attributelabel$',parentid=$parentid$, memo='$memo$',departmentid='$departmentid$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_attributelabel_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_attributelabel_t SET examineflag = $examineflag$, examineman='$examineman$',examinetime='$examinetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT t1.*, GROUP_CONCAT( t2.departname ORDER BY t2.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS departname FROM p_attributelabel_t t1 LEFT JOIN sys_department_t t2 ON FIND_IN_SET(t2.id,t1.departmentid) WHERE t1.validflag > 0 and t1.examineflag=1 and t1.rootid!=9 GROUP BY t1.id

SELECT t1.*, GROUP_CONCAT( t2.departname ORDER BY t2.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS departname FROM p_attributelabel_t t1 LEFT JOIN sys_department_t t2 ON FIND_IN_SET(t2.id,t1.departmentid) WHERE t1.validflag > 0 and t1.examineflag=1 and t1.rootid!=9 and t1.parentid=0 GROUP BY t1.id

SELECT t1.*, GROUP_CONCAT( t2.departname ORDER BY t2.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS departname FROM p_attributelabel_t t1 LEFT JOIN sys_department_t t2 ON FIND_IN_SET(t2.id,t1.departmentid) WHERE t1.validflag > 0 and t1.examineflag=1 GROUP BY t1.id

SELECT t1.*, GROUP_CONCAT( t2.departname ORDER BY t2.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS departname FROM p_attributelabel_t t1 LEFT JOIN sys_department_t t2 ON FIND_IN_SET(t2.id,t1.departmentid) WHERE t1.validflag > 0 and t1.examineflag=1 and t1.rootid!=9 AND t1.attributelabel LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchtext#,'%') GROUP BY t1.id
select * from p_attributelabel_t where id=$id$
select * from p_attributelabel_t where id in ($attributelabel$)
select * from p_attributelabel_t where validflag>0 and parentid=$parentid$
select * from p_attributelabel_t where validflag>0 and parentid=$parentid$ and find_in_set($departmentid$,departmentid)
select * from p_attributelabel_t where FIND_IN_SET(id,queryChildren($parentid$)) and examineflag=1
select * from p_attributelabel_t where FIND_IN_SET(id,queryChildrenWithRoot($parentid$)) and examineflag=1

select GROUP_CONCAT(a.id) from p_attributelabel_t a where a.examineflag=0 and a.validflag=1
FIND_IN_SET($departmentid$,(select t.departmentid from p_attributelabel_t t where t.id=a.rootid))
select * from p_attributelabel_t where id in ($ids$)
select * from p_attributelabel_t where rootid=$rootid$
select GROUP_CONCAT(u.usercode) from sys_user_t u where FIND_IN_SET(u.departmentid,(select departmentid from p_attributelabel_t where id = $ids$))
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_attributelabel_t SET rootid = $rootid$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_personlabel_t (personlabel,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ('$personlabel$',$validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_personlabel_t SET personlabel = '$personlabel$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_personlabel_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_personlabel_t SET attributelabels = '$attributelabels$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select * from p_personlabel_t where validflag>0 order by id asc
select * from p_personlabel_t where id=$id$
select GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) AS attributelabels,GROUP_CONCAT(personlabel ORDER BY id) AS memo from p_personlabel_t where $attributesql$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_customlabel_t (personlabel,parentid,customlabel,labledescription,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personlabel$,$parentid$,'$customlabel$','$labledescription$',$validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_customlabel_t SET customlabel = '$customlabel$',labledescription = '$labledescription$',parentid=$parentid$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_customlabel_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select * from p_customlabel_t where validflag>0 and personlabel=$personlabel$
select ct.*,pt.personlabel AS personlabelname from p_customlabel_t ct LEFT JOIN p_personlabel_t pt ON pt.id=ct.personlabel AND pt.validflag>0 where ct.id=$id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_customtext_t (personnelid,attachments,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo, title1,text1,title2,text2,title3,text3,title4,text4,title5,text5 ) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$attachments$',$validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$', '$title1$','$text1$','$title2$','$text2$','$title3$','$text3$','$title4$','$text4$','$title5$','$text5$' ) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_customtext_t SET attachments = '$attachments$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$', title1='$title1$',text1='$text1$', title2='$title2$',text2='$text2$', title3='$title3$',text3='$text3$', title4='$title4$',text4='$text4$', title5='$title5$',text5='$text5$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_customtext_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select ct.*, GROUP_CONCAT(ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',') AS filesname from p_customtext_t ct LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft1.id,ct.attachments) where ct.id=$id$ and ct.validflag>0 GROUP BY ct.id
select ifnull(ct.id,count(ct.id)) from p_customtext_t ct where ct.personnelid=$personnelid$ and ct.validflag>0
sqlMap.update:
update p_personnel_t set zslabel2='$zslabel2$'
lslabel1='$lslabel1$'
lslabel2='$lslabel2$'
where id=$id$
update p_personnel_t set zslabel1='$zslabel1$',zslabel2='$zslabel2$',lslabel1='$lslabel1$',lslabel2='$lslabel2$' where id=$id$
sqlMap.select: select CONCAT('【二级标签-新增】',addoperator,'新申请人员属性标签：', (select t.attributelabel from p_attributelabel_t t where t.id=a.rootid),'-',attributelabel) as messagecontent from p_attributelabel_t a where a.validflag>0 and a.examineflag=0 and a.id=$id$;

select count(*) from p_personnel_t p where p.validflag>0 and p.isrisk=2
p.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
p.personname like '%$personname$%'
p.sexes like '%$sexes$%'
p.nation like '%$nation$%'
p.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
p.workplace like '%$workplace$%'
p.homepolice like '%$homepolice$%'
p.workpolice like '%$workpolice$%'
p.cytype like '%$cytype$%'

select A.*,count(aj.sfzh) as ajcount from( select p.*,d1.departname AS jurisdictunit,u1.staffName as jurisdictpolice,count(jq.sfzh) as jqcount from p_personnel_t p LEFT JOIN sys_department_t d1 on p.jdunit1=d1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t u1 on p.jdpolice1=u1.id left join f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq on jq.sfzh=p.cardnumber where p.validflag>0 and p.isrisk=2
p.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
p.personname like '%$personname$%'
p.sexes like '%$sexes$%'
p.nation like '%$nation$%'
p.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
p.workplace like '%$workplace$%'
p.homepolice like '%$homepolice$%'
p.workpolice like '%$workpolice$%'
p.cytype like '%$cytype$%'
group by p.id)A left join f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj on aj.sfzh=A.cardnumber group by A.id order by jqcount desc,ajcount desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_personnel_t (cardnumber,personname,personlabel,sexes,persontype,attributelabels,jdunit1,jdpolice1,pphone1,zslabel1,lslabel1, jdunit2,jdpolice2,pphone2,validflag,addoperator,addoperatorid,addtime,memo,houseplace,homeplace,checkmethod, records,nation,marrystatus,education,workplace,isrisk) VALUES ('$cardnumber$','$personname$','$personlabel$','$sexes$','$persontype$','$attributelabels$','$jdunit1$','$jdpolice1$', '$pphone1$','$zslabel1$','$lslabel1$','$jdunit2$','$jdpolice2$','$pphone2$',1,'$addoperator$',$addoperatorid$,'$addtime$', '$memo$','$houseplace$','$homeplace$','$checkmethod$','$records$','$nation$','$marrystatus$','$education$','$workplace$',2) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
select count(DISTINCT p.id) from p_personnel_t p LEFT JOIN sys_user_t u1 on p.jdpolice1=u1.id LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_du_t du on p.id=du.personnelid and du.validflag=1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_chang_t ch on p.id=ch.personnelid and ch.validflag=1 where p.validflag>0 and p.isrisk=1 and FIND_IN_SET($zslabel1$,p.zslabel1)
p.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
p.personname like '%$personname$%'
p.sexes like '%$sexes$%'
p.nation like '%$nation$%'
p.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
p.workplace like '%$workplace$%'
p.homepolice like '%$homepolice$%'
p.workpolice like '%$workpolice$%'
FIND_IN_SET(p.jdunit1,'$jdunit1$')
u1.staffName like '%$jdpolice1$%'
p.persontype = '$persontype$'
du.person_attribute = '$duPersonAttribute$'
du.du_method = '$duMethod$'
du.du_part = '$duPart$'
ch.person_attribute = '$changPersonAttribute$'
ch.chang_method = '$changMethod$'
ch.chang_type = '$changType$'
(du.punish_date >= '$punishDateStart$' OR ch.punish_date >= '$punishDateStart$')
(du.punish_date <= '$punishDateEnd$' OR ch.punish_date <= '$punishDateEnd$')
p.has_shedu_record = $hasSheduRecord$
p.has_shechang_record = $hasSechangRecord$
CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTRING(p.cardnumber, 7, 8), '%Y%m%d'), CURDATE()) < 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = $isMinor$
(p.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or p.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(p.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or p.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
$sqlall$

select DISTINCT p.*, p.house_province AS houseProvince, p.house_city AS houseCity, p.house_county AS houseCounty, p.house_town AS houseTown, p.home_province AS homeProvince, p.home_city AS homeCity, p.home_county AS homeCounty, p.home_town AS homeTown, p.handle_unit AS handleUnit, p.handle_unit_code AS handleUnitCode, p.has_shedu_record AS hasSheduRecord, p.has_shechang_record AS hasSechangRecord, d1.departname AS jurisdictunit,u1.staffName as jurisdictpolice, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTRING(p.cardnumber, 7, 8), '%Y%m%d'), CURDATE()) < 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isMinor from p_personnel_t p LEFT JOIN sys_department_t d1 on p.jdunit1=d1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t u1 on p.jdpolice1=u1.id LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_du_t du on p.id=du.personnelid and du.validflag=1 LEFT JOIN p_zaperson_chang_t ch on p.id=ch.personnelid and ch.validflag=1 where p.validflag>0 and p.isrisk=1 and FIND_IN_SET($zslabel1$,p.zslabel1)
p.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
p.personname like '%$personname$%'
p.sexes like '%$sexes$%'
p.nation like '%$nation$%'
p.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
p.workplace like '%$workplace$%'
p.homepolice like '%$homepolice$%'
p.workpolice like '%$workpolice$%'
FIND_IN_SET(p.jdunit1,'$jdunit1$')
u1.staffName like '%$jdpolice1$%'
p.persontype = '$persontype$'
du.person_attribute = '$duPersonAttribute$'
du.du_method = '$duMethod$'
du.du_part = '$duPart$'
ch.person_attribute = '$changPersonAttribute$'
ch.chang_method = '$changMethod$'
ch.chang_type = '$changType$'
(du.punish_date >= '$punishDateStart$' OR ch.punish_date >= '$punishDateStart$')
(du.punish_date <= '$punishDateEnd$' OR ch.punish_date <= '$punishDateEnd$')
p.has_shedu_record = $hasSheduRecord$
p.has_shechang_record = $hasSechangRecord$
CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, STR_TO_DATE(SUBSTRING(p.cardnumber, 7, 8), '%Y%m%d'), CURDATE()) < 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = $isMinor$
(p.jdunit1 = $unitFilter$ or p.jdunit2 = $unitFilter$)
(p.jdpolice1 = $personFilter$ or p.jdpolice2 = $personFilter$)
$sqlall$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_personnel_t SET zslabel1='$zslabel1$',isrisk='$isrisk$', updateoperator = '$updateoperator$', updatetime = '$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT cw.id,REPLACE(cw.name,'派出所','所') name ,cw.wen,cw.wen1,cw.wen2,cw.wen3 ,ck.kong,ck.kong1,ck.kong2,ck.kong3,ck.kong4 ,cd.du,cd.du1,cd.du2 from ( select A.id,A.departname as name ,count(pg.id) wen ,count(case when pg.jointcontrollevel='一级' then 1 end) wen1 ,count(case when pg.jointcontrollevel='二级' then 1 end) wen2 ,count(case when pg.jointcontrollevel='三级' then 1 end) wen3 from( select * from sys_department_t where id!=55 and id!=264 and validflag>0 and departtype=4 order by id )A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.id,g.jointcontrollevel,p.jdunit1,p.jdunit2 FROM p_personnel_t p LEFT JOIN p_wen_grade_t g on p.id=g.personnelid and g.jointcontrollevel!='自控' and g.jointcontrollevel!='存档' and g.validflag>0 WHERE p.id=g.personnelid and p.isrisk=1 and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY p.id ) pg on pg.jdunit1=A.id GROUP BY A.id ) cw LEFT JOIN( select A.id,A.departname as name ,count(pk.id) kong ,count(case when pk.jointtype=1 then 1 end) kong1 ,count(case when pk.jointtype=2 then 1 end) kong2 ,count(case when pk.jointtype=3 then 1 end) kong3 ,count(case when pk.jointtype=4 then 1 end) kong4 from( select * from sys_department_t where id!=55 and id!=264 and validflag>0 and departtype=4 order by id )A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.id,k.jointtype,p.jdunit1,p.jdunit2 FROM p_personnel_t p LEFT JOIN p_kong_extend_t k on p.id=k.personnelid and k.incontrollevel='在控' and k.validflag>0 WHERE p.id=k.personnelid and p.isrisk=1 and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY p.id ) pk on pk.jdunit1=A.id GROUP BY A.id ) ck on cw.id=ck.id LEFT JOIN( select A.id,A.departname as name ,count(pd.id) du ,count(case when pd.personneltype in (1,3) then 1 end) du1 ,count(case when pd.personneltype in (2,3) then 1 end) du2 from( select * from sys_department_t where id!=55 and id!=264 and validflag>0 and departtype=4 order by id )A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.id,d.personneltype,p.jdunit1,p.jdunit2 FROM p_personnel_t p LEFT JOIN p_du_extend_t d on p.id=d.personnelid and d.validflag>0 WHERE p.id=d.personnelid and p.isrisk=1 and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY p.id ) pd on pd.jdunit1=A.id GROUP BY A.id ) cd on cw.id=cd.id GROUP BY cw.id

SELECT A.addday ,count(case when FIND_IN_SET(1,p.zslabel1) then 1 end) wen ,count(case when FIND_IN_SET(2,p.zslabel1) then 2 end) kong ,count(case when FIND_IN_SET(3,p.zslabel1) then 3 end) hei ,count(case when FIND_IN_SET(4,p.zslabel1) then 4 end) du from( select 1 as addday from dual UNION select 2 as addday from dual UNION select 3 as addday from dual UNION select 4 as addday from dual UNION select 5 as addday from dual UNION select 6 as addday from dual UNION select 7 as addday from dual UNION select 8 as addday from dual UNION select 9 as addday from dual UNION select 10 as addday from dual UNION select 11 as addday from dual UNION select 12 as addday from dual UNION select 13 as addday from dual UNION select 14 as addday from dual UNION select 15 as addday from dual )A LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.addtime>=DATE_SUB(CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 00:00:00') ,INTERVAL A.addday DAY) and DATE_SUB(CONCAT(CURDATE(),' 23:59:59') ,INTERVAL A.addday DAY)>p.addtime and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY A.addday ORDER BY A.addday;

SELECT cw.id,REPLACE(cw.name,'派出所','所') name ,cw.allperson,cw.wen,cw.kong,cw.du ,ck.allevent,ck.event1,ck.event2,ck.event3 from ( select A.id,A.departname as name ,count(p.id) allperson ,count(case when FIND_IN_SET(1,p.zslabel1) then 1 end) wen ,count(case when FIND_IN_SET(2,p.zslabel1) then 1 end) kong ,count(case when FIND_IN_SET(4,p.zslabel1) then 1 end) du from( select * from sys_department_t where id!=55 and id!=264 and validflag>0 and departtype=4 order by id )A LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p on p.jdunit1=A.id and p.isrisk=1 and p.validflag>0 GROUP BY A.id ) cw LEFT JOIN( select A.id,A.departname as name ,count(e.id) allevent ,count(case when e.cdtresult='已化解' then 1 end) event1 ,count(case when e.cdtresult='已钝化' then 1 end) event2 ,count(case when e.cdtresult='处置中' then 1 end) event3 from( select * from sys_department_t where id!=55 and id!=264 and validflag>0 and departtype=4 order by id )A LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t e on e.sponsor=A.id and e.isshield=0 and e.type=1 and e.validflag>0 GROUP BY A.id ) ck on cw.id=ck.id GROUP BY cw.id;

SELECT D1.addday name, D1.allperson, D2.allevent, D3.allcompany, D4.allvehicle FROM ( SELECT A.addday, count( p.id ) allperson FROM ( SELECT 0 AS addday FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 1 AS addday ) A LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p ON p.addtime >= DATE_SUB( CONCAT( CURDATE( ), ' 00:00:00' ), INTERVAL A.addday DAY ) AND DATE_SUB( CONCAT( CURDATE( ), ' 23:59:59' ), INTERVAL A.addday DAY ) > p.addtime AND p.isrisk = 1 AND p.validflag > 0 GROUP BY A.addday ORDER BY A.addday ) D1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.addday, count( e.id ) allevent FROM ( SELECT 0 AS addday FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 1 AS addday ) A LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t e ON e.addtime >= DATE_SUB( CONCAT( CURDATE( ), ' 00:00:00' ), INTERVAL A.addday DAY ) AND DATE_SUB( CONCAT( CURDATE( ), ' 23:59:59' ), INTERVAL A.addday DAY ) > e.addtime AND e.isshield = 0 AND e.type = 1 AND e.validflag > 0 GROUP BY A.addday ORDER BY A.addday ) D2 ON D1.addday = D2.addday LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.addday, count( c.id ) allcompany FROM ( SELECT 0 AS addday FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 1 AS addday ) A LEFT JOIN c_company_t c ON c.addtime >= DATE_SUB( CONCAT( CURDATE( ), ' 00:00:00' ), INTERVAL A.addday DAY ) AND DATE_SUB( CONCAT( CURDATE( ), ' 23:59:59' ), INTERVAL A.addday DAY ) > c.addtime AND c.validflag > 0 GROUP BY A.addday ORDER BY A.addday ) D3 ON D1.addday = D3.addday LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.addday, count( v.id ) allvehicle FROM ( SELECT 0 AS addday FROM DUAL UNION SELECT 1 AS addday ) A LEFT JOIN v_vehicle_t v ON v.addtime >= DATE_SUB( CONCAT( CURDATE( ), ' 00:00:00' ), INTERVAL A.addday DAY ) AND DATE_SUB( CONCAT( CURDATE( ), ' 23:59:59' ), INTERVAL A.addday DAY ) > v.addtime AND v.validflag > 0 GROUP BY A.addday ORDER BY A.addday ) D4 ON D1.addday = D4.addday;

select count(*) from p_personnel_t_zfw zfp where validflag=1
zfp.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
zfp.personname like '%$personname$%'
zfp.persontype = '%$persontype$%'
zfp.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
(FIND_IN_SET(zfp.jdunit1,'$jdunit1$') OR FIND_IN_SET(zfp.jdunit2,'$jdunit1$'))
$sortsql$

select zfp.*,d.departname as jurisdictunit from p_personnel_t_zfw zfp left join sys_department_t d on d.id=zfp.jdunit1 where zfp.validflag=1
zfp.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
zfp.personname like '%$personname$%'
zfp.persontype = '%$persontype$%'
zfp.homeplace like '%$homeplace$%'
(FIND_IN_SET(zfp.jdunit1,'$jdunit1$') OR FIND_IN_SET(zfp.jdunit2,'$jdunit1$'))
$sortsql$
select * from p_personnel_t_zfw where id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_personnel_t_zfw SET id=$id$,personname='$personname$',usedname='$usedname$',nickname='$nickname$',nation='$nation$', marrystatus='$marrystatus$',personheight='$personheight$',netskillhabit='$netskillhabit$', education='$education$',persontype='$persontype$',soldierstatus='$soldierstatus$', heathstatus='$heathstatus$',politicalposition='$politicalposition$',faith='$faith$', houseplace='$houseplace$',housepolice='$housepolice$', homeplace='$homeplace$',homepolice='$homepolice$',homewifi='$homewifi$',homewide='$homewide$', workplace='$workplace$',workpolice='$workpolice$',workwifi='$workwifi$',workwide='$workwide$', housex='$housex$',housey='$housey$', homex='$homex$',homey='$homey$', workx='$workx$',worky='$worky$', feature='$feature$',speciality='$speciality$',records='$records$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$',memo='$memo$',validflag=$validflag$,sexes='$sexes$' WHERE cardnumber='$cardnumber$'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_personnel_t (cardnumber,personname,personlabel,sexes,persontype,attributelabels,jdunit1,jdpolice1,pphone1,zslabel1,lslabel1, jdunit2,jdpolice2,pphone2,validflag,addoperator,addoperatorid,addtime,memo,houseplace,homeplace,checkmethod, records,nation,marrystatus,education,workplace,usedname,nickname,personheight,netskillhabit,soldierstatus,heathstatus,politicalposition, faith,housepolice,homepolice,homewifi,homewide,workpolice,workwifi,workwide,housex,housey,homex,homey,workx,worky,feature,speciality) VALUES ('$cardnumber$','$personname$','$personlabel$','$sexes$','$persontype$','$attributelabels$','$jdunit1$','$jdpolice1$', '$pphone1$','$zslabel1$','$lslabel1$','$jdunit2$','$jdpolice2$','$pphone2$',$validflag$,'$addoperator$',$addoperatorid$, '$addtime$','$memo$','$houseplace$','$homeplace$','$checkmethod$','$records$','$nation$','$marrystatus$','$education$','$workplace$', '$usedname$','$nickname$','$personheight$','$netskillhabit$','$soldierstatus$','$heathstatus$','$politicalposition$','$faith$', '$housepolice$','$housepolice$','$homewifi$','$homewide$','$workpolice$','$workwifi$','$workwide$','$housex$','$housey$', '$homex$','$homey$','$workx$','$worky$','$feature$','$speciality$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_personnel_t SET home_province = #homeProvince#, home_city = #homeCity#, home_county = #homeCounty#, home_town = #homeTown#, home_police_station_id = #homePoliceStationId#, homeplace = #homeplace#, homepolice = #homepolice#, homex = #homex#, homey = #homey# WHERE id = #id#
UPDATE p_personnel_t SET phone='$phone$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_personnel_t SET has_shedu_record=$hasSheduRecord$ WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_personnel_t SET has_shechang_record=$hasSechangRecord$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v_homeplace_history_with_police_station WHERE personnelid = #value# AND validflag = 1

SELECT id, personnelid, province, city, county, town, police_station_name as policeStationName, detail_address as detailAddress, longitude, latitude, start_date as startDate, end_date as endDate, addtime FROM v_homeplace_history_with_police_station WHERE personnelid = #value# AND validflag = 1 ORDER BY addtime DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p_phonenum_history_t WHERE personnelid = #value# AND validflag = 1

SELECT id, personnelid, phone, phone_type as phoneType, operator, start_date as startDate, end_date as endDate, addtime FROM p_phonenum_history_t WHERE personnelid = #value# AND validflag = 1 ORDER BY addtime DESC
